summary: Good-quality recording of a nicely received but otherwise unremarkable show
review: Both reviewers found the performance enjoyable, describing it as a "nice show" and praising the sound quality as “dam good”. No specific musical highlights or issues were mentioned, and the source type is not identified.

ai_rating.rationale: Two reviews give moderate to high ratings; one explicitly lauds the recording quality while the other offers a lukewarm but positive impression of the show.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls it a "dam good recording" with no complaints about clarity or balance.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed comments on set structure; reviewers simply note the show was nice.
